prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关理科专业（计算机类、电子信息类、电气工程等）社会热度高热推荐，就业前景良好；本省 2026 年考生总数约 37.79 万（较 2025 年 28.57 万大幅增加约 32%），物理类估算约 22.94 万，竞争显著加剧；中央民族大学位于北京，对西南地区考生有较强吸引力；该校在云南招生占比约 2.5%–3%，属中等偏上水平，地域偏好对报考热度有正向支撑。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026 年计划扩招 5 人、本省考生总数大幅增加以及学校排名持续上升等因素，在 2025 年基准 7586 名基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约 7946 名，区间 7446–8446 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 5819→6447→8737→6961→7586, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1700 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 7586; the provincial science group plan was 52 in 2021, 90 in 2022, 88 in 2023, 73 in 2024, and 76 in 2025 (Physics Category), with a 2026 plan of 81, an increase of 5 (+6.6%) compared to 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; approximately 79th on the Soft Science main ranking (2026), with a continuous rise in recent years (from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026), indicating steady improvement in comprehensive strength and reputation; recent reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 80th, rated as 'average', with moderate attention on short video platforms and no abnormal application signals; Ethnology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, which do not directly correspond to the majors in the Physics Category (Computer Class, Electronic Information Class, Statistics Class, etc.), but the overall 985 level still strongly attracts science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Related science majors (Computer Class, Electronic Information Class, Electrical Engineering, etc.) are highly recommended with good employment prospects; the total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is about 377,900 (a significant increase of about 32% from 285,700 in 2025), with an estimated 229,400 in the Physics Category, intensifying competition; Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, which strongly attracts candidates from the southwestern region; its enrollment proportion in Yunnan is about 2.5%–3%, which is moderately high, and regional preference positively supports application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 5, the significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province, and the continuous rise in the school's ranking, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 7586; the predicted minimum ranking is about 7946, with a range of 7446–8446.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 911→925→1370→1142→6805 (in 2025, including the special major group with Tibetan language test for the Law Innovation Experimental Class, the minimum for regular classes was 1650), showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a baseline of about 6805 in 2025; the provincial liberal arts group enrollment plan was 36 in 2021, 39 in 2022, 44 in 2023, 55 in 2024, 57 in 2025 (History Category), and 56 in 2026, a slight reduction of 1 compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 79th on the Soft Science main list (2026), with rankings continuously rising in recent years (from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026), indicating steady improvement in overall strength and reputation; recent reputation stable, with no significant negative public opinion incidents; ranked 80th in Douyin popularity, rated as 'average', with moderate attention on short video platforms, showing no abnormal application signals; Ethnology A+ (top nationally), Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, highly corresponding to the university's liberal arts group enrollment majors (Ethnology, Chinese Language and Literature, Sociology, etc.), offering some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Related liberal arts majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, etc.) show social popularity divergence: Law is relatively hot but competitive, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 377,900 (a significant increase of about 32% from 285,700 in 2025), with the History Category estimated at about 148,500, leading to notably intensified competition; Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, which has strong appeal for candidates from the southwestern region; the university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan is about 2.5%–3%, at an upper-middle level, with regional preference positively supporting application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province, and the continuous rise in the university's ranking, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 6805; the predicted minimum ranking is about 6783, with a range of 6283–7283.
